name: Hermes
description: Primary harness. Connects to a Hermes gateway over HTTP or runs the hermes CLI subprocess when a profile is configured. Supports personal agents: create a profile at ~/.hermes/profiles/<name>, add it to AGENT_CONFIGS with a 'profile' key, and RepoCiv will route to it automatically.

profiles.mechanism: HERMES_HOME env var points the subprocess to a profile directory
profiles.note: Each profile is a fully independent Hermes instance with its own config, SOUL.md, skills, memory, and subagents. WORKER and SCOUT ship with default profiles. Add your own agent by creating a profile and registering it in AGENT_CONFIGS.

model_selection.http: HERMES_MODEL env var or per-request override via UI model picker
model_selection.cli: -m flag passed to hermes chat; defaults to profile configuration

concurrency: configurable per agent via AGENT_CONCURRENCY in scheduler.py

profile_binding.harness_ref_semantics: Name of subdirectory under ~/.hermes/profiles/<harness_ref> OR absolute validated path. Use 'default' to omit HERMES_HOME and let the subprocess use its own default config.

identity_mode.native: Read/write SOUL.md inside the profile dir at ~/.hermes/profiles/<harness_ref>/SOUL.md
identity_mode.managed: Read/write ~/.repociv/profiles/<name>/identity.md; inject via system_prompt on dispatch

profile_binding.harness_options_note: List subdirs of ~/.hermes/profiles/ to show available profiles
